

# About me

## Dania Carr

[will insert profile picture here]

### Professional Interests

I am a doctoral student in the Developmental Psychology program at the University of Chicago and an Institute of Education Sciences (IES) fellow. My research examines how socio-emotional, cognitive, and linguistic factors incluence children's mathematical thinking. I am interested in applying my research, data analysis, and data visualization skills to uncover patterns in educational data, generate actionable insights, and support evidence-based strategy and decision making.

### Personal Interests 

I love playing pool, relaxing at the Chicago lakefront (especially during summer months), and hiking. I also love spending time with my husband and my dog. 

[will insert picture of husband and dog]
